title: Dragon slayer from anime Berserk
description: Resource pack makes it possible to replace any sword with a Dragon slayer from the anime Berserk by renaming
body: OptiFine required! ( Rename Any sword to "Dragon slayer" to use it. ) For support, download this resource pack from my website: [berserk_sword.zip](https://mineanimecreations.com/resource-pack/berserk_sword.zip) Discord server: discord.gg/z86yJcAZKc. Also check out my other packs: https://modrinth.com/user/MineAnimeCreations Resource pack makes it possible to replace any sword with a Dragon slayer from the anime Berserk by renaming
